title: Khanpachi's Swords
body:
This mod adds nice 3d swords taking inspiration from other games, currently added swords are:

- The Red Claymore
- The Swiftblade
- Genesis Sword
- Twisted Scythe

These weapons will improve your gameplay and adventures and add many new experiences to your next modpack! Dying a lot to strong mobs? Use the Red Claymore to survive in dire circumstances. Other weapons like the Swiftblade have unique characteristics that suit your playstyle.

It is highly recommended to use Better Combat mod with Khanpachi's Swords.

This mod is currently under development, and we strive to make daily improvements. There is still much that we aim to achieve in this early stage of the mod, as we seek to incorporate players' desires. If you have any recommendations for our mod, feel free to join our Discord server. https://discord.gg/p5xajUAwa8.
